image_prompt.prompt: Ultra photorealistic raw iPhone mirror selfie of a young woman in her early 20s standing in a modern minimalist bedroom. She has long honey blonde hair falling past her shoulders in loose natural waves with subtle sun-kissed highlights. Hourglass athletic-toned curvaceous figure with natural skin texture and visible pores. She wears a fitted dusty rose ribbed crop top that hugs her curves and high-waisted black leggings. One hand holds an iPhone 15 Pro Max at chest height, the other rests casually on her hip with fingers slightly spread. Her weight shifts to her left leg creating a subtle hip tilt to the right. She gazes at the phone screen with a confident playful expression and soft natural smile, lips slightly parted. Slight head tilt to the right. The room has a clean white wall behind a large black-framed full-length mirror, light wood flooring, and a neatly made bed with cream linen sheets visible in the background. Natural golden hour sunlight streams from a window to the left, casting warm highlights across her skin and soft directional shadows on the wall. The lighting creates a warm golden glow on her face and arms with subtle rim light on her hair. Soft pink, warm cream, golden amber color palette. Casual everyday influencer aesthetic. Shot at eye-level in portrait orientation, centered composition. Photorealistic, high quality, high resolution, 9:16 aspect ratio.

posts.notes: Variant A: provocative question format. Short, direct engagement prompt. Mirror selfie with golden hour lighting — top-performing visual style per competitor analysis.

image_prompt.prompt: Ultra photorealistic photo of a young woman in her early 20s standing ankle-deep in crystal clear turquoise ocean water on a pristine tropical beach at golden hour. She has long wavy dark auburn hair flowing behind her in the ocean breeze, catching warm sunlight. Athletic-toned curvaceous hourglass figure with natural sun-kissed skin showing real texture and a light golden tan. She wears a white flowing midi sundress with thin spaghetti straps, the lightweight cotton fabric pressing against her body in the wind, the hem getting slightly wet from the surf. Her skin glistens with a light sheen of salt water spray. She stands facing the camera in a relaxed confident pose, weight shifted to her right leg, left hand reaching up to hold her hair back from the wind, right arm hanging naturally at her side. She looks directly at the camera with a warm radiant smile, chin slightly up, bright eyes reflecting the golden light. Behind her the ocean stretches to the horizon with gentle rolling waves, the sky painted in warm peach and soft lavender sunset gradients. Wet sand reflects the sky colors beneath her feet. Bright golden hour sunlight from the left creates a warm backlight halo effect on her hair and body, long soft shadows stretching across the wet sand, and a warm amber glow illuminating her face. Warm gold, ocean turquoise, sunset peach, clean white color palette. Beach golden hour lifestyle aesthetic. Third-person shot, eye-level, full body framing, centered vertical composition. Photorealistic, high quality, high resolution, 9:16 aspect ratio.
